questionHtml:
An object of mass m released from rest near the surface of a planet has an initial acceleration z. What is the gravitational field strength near the surface of the planet?

A.  z

B.  zm

C.  mz

D.  mz

meta.title: An object of mass m released from rest near the surface of a planet has an initial acceleration z. What is the gravitational field strength near the surface of the planet? A. z B.
